name: ai-zippy/cotop-company-overview
title: CO-TOP Company Overview
description: CO-TOP about overview with copy, stats, and image.

body.default:
Founded in 1994, CO-TOP Marketing Pte Ltd has grown from a specialist surface supplier into one of Singapore's most trusted full-service fabrication and installation companies. We serve residential, commercial, and hospitality sectors with equal dedication.

Our philosophy is simple: every surface we touch should be a testament to the quality of the materials and the skill of our craftsmen. Whether it's a custom kitchen countertop or a large-scale commercial cladding project, we bring the same precision and care.

With a team of dedicated specialists across sales, fabrication, and installation, we pride ourselves on delivering end-to-end solutions that remove the complexity from your project and replace it with confidence.
